context.p: Use this procedure to upgrade Cloud-Native Router to the current release.

step.cmd: Download the tarball, Juniper_Cloud_Native_Router_release_number.tgz, to the directory of your choice. You must perform the file transfer in binary mode when transferring the file to your server so that the compressed tar file expands properly.

info.note: All remaining steps in the upgrade assume that your current working directory is now Juniper_Cloud_Native_Router_release-number.

step.cmd: Customize the helm chart for your deployment using the helmchart/values.yaml file to match the helm chart configuration in your current installation.
Deploy the Juniper Cloud-Native Router using the helm chart. Navigate to the helmchart directory and run the following command:

info.codeblock: helm upgrade jcnr . Release "jcnr" has been upgraded. Happy Helming! NAME: jcnr LAST DEPLOYED: <date> NAMESPACE: default STATUS: deployed REVISION: <revision> TEST SUITE: None

step.cmd: Confirm that Juniper Cloud-Native Router has been deployed by looking for the deployed STATUS in the output.
